title: Transitional Housing/Shelter * Homeless Women - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Transitional Housing/Shelter * Homeless Women 6 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Homeless Youth nsitional Housing/Shelter AIDS/HIV Crime Victims Disabilities Issues Homeless Families Homeless Men Homeless Veterans Homeless Women Pregnant Individuals Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF AGAPE HOUSE MARTHA'S HOUSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides transitional housing to families and women escaping domestic violence or experiencing homelessness. Also offers supportive services including social service referrals, job readiness, budgeting, and other life skills in preparation for independent living. Eligibility: Families with children ages 0-18, or single women. Must be alcohol and drug free, and no pets. Hours: House: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Office: Tuesday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-3pm, Friday 9am-noon Email (541) 571-3963 Visit Website More Details ANN'S HEART WOMEN'S SHELTER EMERGENCY 90 DAY SHELTER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides transitional housing services. Guests will have access to personalized case management services with the goal being to remove barriers to attaining permanent housing and may stay in the shelter for up to 90 days (with possible 30 day extensions). Eligibility: Individuals experiencing homelessness who are 18 and older and identify as female. Clients may bring 1 cat or dog. Pets must have shots and preferrably be spayed or neutuered. Hours: Not applicable Email (541) 897-9764 102 Visit Website More Details LOVE INC NEWBERG WOMEN'S TRANSITIONAL LIVING PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides Christian faith-based transitional housing. 200 S College Street Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Single women age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-1pm Email (503) 537-3999 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PARKER HOUSE PROJECT PARKER HOUSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a transitional housing program with individualized case management, support, and mentoring services. 2895 Highway 66 Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: Women age 18 and older and women with minor children Hours: Information/Intake: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm House: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week for current residents Email (541) 500-7381 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TRANSITION PROJECTS JEAN'S PLACE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 60-bed short-term, transitional housing residential program. Provides case management, life and job skills training, and support services. Stays are generally 4-6 months long. Beds at a shelter are not guaranteed. 650 NW Irving Street Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Female-identified adults age 18 and older, with priority for those 55 and older, those with disabilities, and veterans. Abstinence from alcohol and drugs is expected of residents; random breathalyzer and urinalysis testing is conducted. Hours: Residential Program: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Resource Center (in person or phone): Monday-Friday 8:30am-7pm, Saturday/Sunday/all holidays 8:30am-3pm; service intakes end 15 minutes before close (503) 280-4700 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WOMEN AT THE WELL GRACE HOUSE GRACE HOUSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a transitional shelter for women, focusing on encouraging them to make healthy life goal decisions. Clients are offered basic life skills, education, and guidance to provide the tools to make choices leading to self-sufficiency. Services include support groups, outreach, referrals, and optional faith-based teachings. 1243 Peace Street SE Salem, OR 97302 Eligibility: Women age 18 and older without minor dependents. Residents must comply with the zero-tolerance policy for drugs and alcohol. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-2pm Email (971) 600-3627 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOVE INC NEWBERG WOMEN'S TRANSITIONAL LIVING PROGRAM PARKER HOUSE PROJECT PARKER HOUSE TRANSITION PROJECTS JEAN'S PLACE WOMEN AT THE WELL GRACE HOUSE GRACE HOUSE
